channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18714] sanity-compr test_56xb: hard links individually migrated (1 != 11)
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/911306ae-d699-4476-b2d0-6992302e846a

test_56xb failed with the following error:

== sanity test 56xb: lfs migration hard link support ===== 03:42:18 (1738122138)
striped dir -i0 -c2 -H crush2 /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity
testing lfs migrate mode when all links fit within xattrs
creating initial file...done
creating symlinks...done
creating nonlinked files...done
creating hard links 2:100...done
checking number of hard links listed in xattrs...100
migrating files...lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq6: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq6: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq8: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq8: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq7: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq7: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq4: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq4: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq1: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq1: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq10: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq10: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq9: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq9: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq5: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq5: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq3: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq3: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
lfs migrate: failed to fsync dst file: Invalid argument (22)
error: lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq2: data copy failed: Invalid argument

/mnt/lustre/d56xb.sanity/uniq2: refusing to fall back to rsync, skipped
done
verifying files... sanity test_56xb: @@@@@@ FAIL: hard links individually migrated (1 != 11)

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/110691 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/110691 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-compr test_56xb - hard links individually migrated (1 != 11)
item.summary: sanity-compr test_56xb: hard links individually migrated (1 != 11)

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
sanity: FAIL: test_56xb hard links individually migrated (1 != 11)
sanity: FAIL: test_56xd lfs_migrate --yaml:  -E 1048576 -c 1 -S 1048576 -L raid0 -i 2 -E -1 -c 1 -S 4194304 -L raid0 -i 3 !=  -E 1048576 -c 1 -S 524288 -L raid0 -i 0 -E -1 -c 2 -S 1048576 -L raid0 -i 0
sanity: FAIL: test_56xe cannot migrate /mnt/lustre/d56xe.sanity/f56xe.sanity by lfs migrate
sanity: FAIL: test_56xf cannot migrate /mnt/lustre/d56xf.sanity/f56xf.sanity by lfs migrate
sanity: FAIL: test_56ec setstripe did not set OST index correctly
